creator: empty.japan
caption:
In Japan, Daruma dolls are often seen as lucky charms, but their true meaning runs much deeper. They symbolize perseverance and determination. When setting a goal, you paint one eye as a promise to yourself to stay committed. The other eye remains blank as a quiet reminder to keep going. Once you achieve your goal, you paint in the second eye - completing the Daruma.

Locations: 
📍Sunny Kitchen restaurant 
📍Shorinzan Daruma-ji Temple
📍Twisted Brew coffee shop
